# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

interface ModuleConfig {
  path: string;
  name: string;
}

interface UserConfig {
  modules: ModuleConfig[];
}

const DEFAULT_MODULES: ModuleConfig[] = [
  { path: "./default-module.ts", name: "default" }
];

async function loadModule(modulePath: string): Promise<any> {
  try {
    const module = await import(modulePath);
    return module;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Failed to load module ${modulePath}:`, error);
    throw new Error(`Module load failed: ${modulePath}`);
  }
}

function parseUserConfig(): UserConfig {
  const envModules = Deno.env.get("MODULES");
  const config: UserConfig = { modules: [] };

  if (envModules) {
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(envModules);
      if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
        config.modules = parsed.map((item: any) => ({
          path: item.path || "",
          name: item.name || ""
        })).filter((item: ModuleConfig) => item.path);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to parse MODULES environment variable:", error);
    }
  }

  return config;
}

function getUserModulePaths(request: Request): string[] {
  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const modulePaths = url.searchParams.get("modules");
  
  if (modulePaths) {
    try {
      const paths = JSON.parse(modulePaths);
      return Array.isArray(paths) ? paths : [paths];
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to parse query parameter modules:", error);
      return [];
    }
  }
  
  return [];
}

async function handleRequest(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const userConfig = parseUserConfig();
  const queryModulePaths = getUserModulePaths(request);
  
  let allModulePaths: string[] = [];
  
  if (queryModulePaths.length > 0) {
    allModulePaths = queryModulePaths;
  } else if (userConfig.modules.length > 0) {
    allModulePaths = userConfig.modules.map(m => m.path);
  } else {
    allModulePaths = DEFAULT_MODULES.map(m => m.path);
  }
  
  const loadedModules: any[] = [];
  
  for (const modulePath of allModulePaths) {
    try {
      const module = await loadModule(modulePath);
      loadedModules.push(module);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(`Error loading module ${modulePath}:`, error);
    }
  }
  
  return new Response(JSON.stringify({
    message: "Modules loaded successfully",
    loadedModules: loadedModules.map((m, i) => ({
      path: allModulePaths[i],
      exports: Object.keys(m)
    }))
  }), {
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
  });
}

Deno.serve(handleRequest);
